## Meeting Purpose

[Follow-up discussion on Meritech's investment decision regarding GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/qQjJLm1yv2vRW1uxprB_1bus1-D3UFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Meritech decided not to invest in GrowthX, citing uncertainty about the agency model's evolution in the AI market](https://fathom.video/share/qQjJLm1yv2vRW1uxprB_1bus1-D3UFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=40.0)
  - [GrowthX's strong unit economics and customer success were acknowledged, but concerns about long-term market dynamics prevailed](https://fathom.video/share/qQjJLm1yv2vRW1uxprB_1bus1-D3UFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [GrowthX expects to be profitable in 2 months and is running a tight fundraising process ending this week](https://fathom.video/share/qQjJLm1yv2vRW1uxprB_1bus1-D3UFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [Both parties expressed interest in maintaining a positive relationship for potential future collaborations](https://fathom.video/share/qQjJLm1yv2vRW1uxprB_1bus1-D3UFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)

## Topics

### Meritech's Investment Decision

  - [Meritech declined to invest in GrowthX despite positive impressions of the business](https://fathom.video/share/qQjJLm1yv2vRW1uxprB_1bus1-D3UFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=40.0)
  - [Key reasons for the decision:](https://fathom.video/share/qQjJLm1yv2vRW1uxprB_1bus1-D3UFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=43.0)
      - [Uncertainty about the agency model's evolution in the AI market over 2-3 years](https://fathom.video/share/qQjJLm1yv2vRW1uxprB_1bus1-D3UFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)
      - [Lack of full conviction required for Meritech's small team and selective investment approach](https://fathom.video/share/qQjJLm1yv2vRW1uxprB_1bus1-D3UFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=78.0)
      - [Debates around AI tooling vs. external services for company success](https://fathom.video/share/qQjJLm1yv2vRW1uxprB_1bus1-D3UFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)

### GrowthX's Business Performance

  - [Strong customer feedback and business momentum noted](https://fathom.video/share/qQjJLm1yv2vRW1uxprB_1bus1-D3UFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=25.0)
  - [Impressive top-line growth and efficiency metrics](https://fathom.video/share/qQjJLm1yv2vRW1uxprB_1bus1-D3UFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=25.0)
  - [Unit economics described as "so strong" by Alex](https://fathom.video/share/qQjJLm1yv2vRW1uxprB_1bus1-D3UFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Marcel mentioned the business is "exploding" with significant developments](https://fathom.video/share/qQjJLm1yv2vRW1uxprB_1bus1-D3UFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)

### Fundraising Process and Company Outlook

  - [GrowthX running a "very tight process" ending this week](https://fathom.video/share/qQjJLm1yv2vRW1uxprB_1bus1-D3UFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [Company expects to be profitable in 2 months](https://fathom.video/share/qQjJLm1yv2vRW1uxprB_1bus1-D3UFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)
  - [Marcel indicated they might not raise funds again, given their trajectory](https://fathom.video/share/qQjJLm1yv2vRW1uxprB_1bus1-D3UFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)
  - [Significant tech developments expected in the next 1-2 months, potentially changing the company's profile](https://fathom.video/share/qQjJLm1yv2vRW1uxprB_1bus1-D3UFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)

### Market Dynamics and AI Impact

  - [Meritech's concerns centered on the "AI air pocket explosion" and its long-term effects](https://fathom.video/share/qQjJLm1yv2vRW1uxprB_1bus1-D3UFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)
  - [Debates about how companies will allocate resources between AI tooling and external services like GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/qQjJLm1yv2vRW1uxprB_1bus1-D3UFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [Uncertainty about the competitive landscape in 2-3 years as AI becomes more established](https://fathom.video/share/qQjJLm1yv2vRW1uxprB_1bus1-D3UFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)

### Relationship and Future Collaboration

  - [Both parties expressed interest in maintaining a positive relationship](https://fathom.video/share/qQjJLm1yv2vRW1uxprB_1bus1-D3UFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)
  - [Alex offered to refer portfolio companies to GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/qQjJLm1yv2vRW1uxprB_1bus1-D3UFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)
  - [Marcel appreciated the feedback and insights from the process](https://fathom.video/share/qQjJLm1yv2vRW1uxprB_1bus1-D3UFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to conclude their fundraising process by the end of the week](https://fathom.video/share/qQjJLm1yv2vRW1uxprB_1bus1-D3UFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [Meritech to potentially refer portfolio companies to GrowthX for services](https://fathom.video/share/qQjJLm1yv2vRW1uxprB_1bus1-D3UFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)
  - [Both parties to stay in touch and monitor GrowthX's progress](https://fathom.video/share/qQjJLm1yv2vRW1uxprB_1bus1-D3UFFq?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
